intro: The cryptocurrency sector faced a concentrated wave of attacks between April 12 and April 28, 2026, with 19 reported incidents affecting financial services and decentralized finance (DeFi) globally, particularly in the United States, Canada, Europe, and North America. The severity mix included 1 medium, 15 high, and 3 critical alerts. Threat actors Lazarus Group, BlueNoroff, and FakeWallet were observed in these operations, while CVE-2023-4863 was the top vulnerability exploited.
